name: tehvault
description: Tehvault's internal Claude Code marketplace — shared skills and MCP servers for the whole team.

plugins.name: tehvault-toolkit
plugins.description: Tehvault's shared Claude Code toolkit: graphify (knowledge-graph), ui-ux-pro-max and flutter-ui-ux (design intelligence) skills, plus the code-review-graph MCP server. NOTE: graphify and code-review-graph require external CLIs — see the repo README for the one-time pip install.

plugins.name: context7
plugins.description: [curated by Tehvault] Live, version-accurate docs for any library/framework — stops stale-API hallucinations.  —  Upstash Context7 MCP server for up-to-date documentation lookup. Pull version-specific documentation and code examples directly from source repositories into your LLM context.

plugins.name: serena
plugins.description: [curated by Tehvault] Semantic code navigation & editing across large codebases (LSP-powered).  —  Semantic code analysis MCP server providing intelligent code understanding, refactoring suggestions, and codebase navigation through language server protocol integration.

plugins.name: playwright
plugins.description: [curated by Tehvault] Browser automation & end-to-end testing for the web frontends.  —  Browser automation and end-to-end testing MCP server by Microsoft. Enables Claude to interact with web pages, take screenshots, fill forms, click elements, and perform automated browser testing workflows.

plugins.name: github
plugins.description: [curated by Tehvault] PR / issue / repo workflows from inside Claude Code.  —  Official GitHub MCP server for repository management. Create issues, manage pull requests, review code, search repositories, and interact with GitHub's full API directly from Claude Code.

plugins.name: sentry
plugins.description: [curated by Tehvault] Pull live error & performance data from Sentry while debugging.  —  Sentry error monitoring integration. Access error reports, analyze stack traces, search issues by fingerprint, and debug production errors directly from your development environment.

plugins.name: stripe
plugins.description: [curated by Tehvault] Work with the Stripe API — directly relevant to your Checkout/booking flows.  —  Stripe development plugin for Claude

plugins.name: figma
plugins.description: [curated by Tehvault] Pull designs & specs from Figma into UI work (pairs with your UI/UX skills).  —  Figma design platform integration. Access design files, extract component information, read design tokens, and translate designs into code. Bridge the gap between design and development workflows.

plugins.name: semgrep
plugins.description: [curated by Tehvault] Static security scanning — valuable for a payments / vault product.  —  Semgrep catches security vulnerabilities in real-time and guides Claude to write secure code from the start.

plugins.name: skill-creator
plugins.description: [curated by Tehvault] Scaffold NEW custom skills so the team can keep growing this toolkit.  —  Create new skills, improve existing skills, and measure skill performance. Use when users want to create a skill from scratch, update or optimize an existing skill, run evals to test a skill, or benchmark skill performance with variance analysis.

plugins.name: firebase
plugins.description: [curated by Tehvault] Firebase MCP — Firestore, auth, cloud functions; matches your firebase-rbac work.  —  Google Firebase MCP integration. Manage Firestore databases, authentication, cloud functions, hosting, and storage. Build and manage your Firebase backend directly from your development workflow.

plugins.name: chrome-devtools-mcp
plugins.description: [curated by Tehvault] Drive/inspect a live Chrome browser — debug your web frontends & capture perf traces.  —  Control and inspect a live Chrome browser from your coding agent. Record performance traces, analyze network requests, check console messages with source-mapped stack traces, and automate browser actions with Puppeteer.

plugins.name: mongodb
plugins.description: [curated by Tehvault] MongoDB MCP + skills — connect, explore, and query data from the Node microservices.  —  Official Claude plugin for MongoDB (MCP Server + Skills). Connect to databases, explore data, manage collections, optimize queries, generate reliable code, implement best practices, develop advanced features, and more.

plugins.name: expo
plugins.description: [curated by Tehvault] Expo / React Native build, deploy, and debug skills.  —  Official Expo skills for building, deploying, upgrading, and debugging React Native apps with Expo. Covers UI development with Expo Router, SwiftUI and Jetpack Compose components, Tailwind CSS setup, API routes, data fetching, CI/CD workflows, App Store and Play Store deployment, SDK upgrades, DOM components, and dev client distribution.

plugins.name: feature-dev
plugins.description: [curated by Tehvault] Anthropic's multi-agent feature-development workflow (explore → design → implement).  —  Comprehensive feature development workflow with specialized agents for codebase exploration, architecture design, and quality review

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: [curated by Tehvault] Anthropic's multi-agent PR review with confidence-based findings.  —  Automated code review for pull requests using multiple specialized agents with confidence-based scoring to filter false positives

plugins.name: commit-commands
plugins.description: [curated by Tehvault] Git helpers for commit / push / PR creation.  —  Commands for git commit workflows including commit, push, and PR creation

plugins.name: linear
plugins.description: [curated by Tehvault] Linear issue tracking — create/manage issues & projects.  —  Linear issue tracking integration. Create issues, manage projects, update statuses, search across workspaces, and streamline your software development workflow with Linear's modern issue tracker.

plugins.name: notion
plugins.description: [curated by Tehvault] Notion workspace — search pages, create/update docs & databases.  —  Notion workspace integration. Search pages, create and update documents, manage databases, and access your team's knowledge base directly from Claude Code for seamless documentation workflows.

plugins.name: slack
plugins.description: [curated by Tehvault] Slack workspace — search messages, read channels & threads.  —  Slack workspace integration. Search messages, access channels, read threads, and stay connected with your team's communications while coding. Find relevant discussions and context quickly.
